title: juncus smithii
intro: Juncus smithii, also known as the green needle rush, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family and is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Juncus smithii include reducing swelling and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Juncus smithii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
